headline: THE PERSON BEHIND THE LICENCE
subheading: What MHRA inspectors really expect from your Responsible Person on a WDA.
flux_prompt: An abstract clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical wholesale distribution oversight: a serene, temperature-controlled storage corridor rendered as softly blurred rows of unbranded medicine cartons receding into a deep navy void, with a single sharp glowing teal status indicator and a delicate cyan temperature-monitoring line graph drifting as translucent overlays. A symbolic luminous shield or seal motif hovers subtly, suggesting authority and approval, while fine interconnected nodes trace a supply-chain pathway in thin cyan light. A precise document-and-checklist silhouette emerges abstractly from the glow, conveying audit and quality control. Cool deep navy dominates, lifted by teal and cyan luminosity and a single fresh-green accent on one verified checkpoint.
